zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen於大約1518年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾傑利 伯頓時，她的父親Thomas Aston40歲，母親Mrs Thomas Paston-29歲。她於大約1535年與Robert Lowthrop在英國越可爾傑利 伯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1573年3月8日在英國越可爾傑利 伯頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾傑利 伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen was born about 1518, in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Aston, was 40 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Paston, was -29. She married Robert Lowthrop about 1535, in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 March 1573, in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Robert Lowthrop environ 1535, à Cherry Burton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1573, à Cherry Burton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Cherry Burton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellenが約1518年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアチェリー ブルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Astonは40歳，母Mrs Thomas Pastonは-29歳であった。約1535年にイギリスヨークシュアイアチェリー ブルトンでRobert Lowthropと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1573年3月8日にイギリスヨークシュアイアチェリー ブルトンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアチェリー ブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen(이)가 대략 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 처리 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Aston(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Paston(은)는 -29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 영국 요르크실르 처리 버턴에서 Robert Lowthrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 3월 8일 영국 요르크실르 처리 버턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 처리 버턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen родилась около 1518 г. в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Aston было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Paston, -29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Lowthrop около 1535 г. в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 марта 1573 г. в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
